Description: Replace all try/catch blocks with a centralized error handling system that categorizes errors (AI API failures network errors validation errors). Implement exponential backoff retry logic with jitter for OpenRouter API calls.
Acceptance Criteria: All API calls have retry logic with max 3 attempts. Errors are categorized and logged with correlation IDs. No unhandled promise rejections.
Notes: Use custom error classes extending Error

Description: Implement circuit breaker for OpenRouter API to prevent cascading failures when the service is down. Configurable thresholds for failure rate and recovery timeout.
Acceptance Criteria: Circuit breaker trips after 5 failures in 60 seconds. Auto-recovery after 30 seconds. Status visible in health endpoint.

Description: Replace console.log with Pino or Winston structured logging. Include request IDs trace IDs timestamps and severity levels. Write logs to rotating files and optionally to Loki/CloudWatch.
Acceptance Criteria: All logs are JSON structured with timestamp level message traceId. Separate files for error warn info. Log rotation daily.

Description: Generate correlation IDs at entry points (CLI TUI API) and propagate through all async operations. Trace agent delegation chains and tool executions.
Acceptance Criteria: Every log entry includes traceId. Agent chains show full delegation path. Traces viewable in dashboard.

Description: Use Zod to validate all environment variables at startup. Create a typed configuration object that validates OPENROUTER_API_KEY ORCA_LOG_LEVEL ORCA_DB_URL etc. Fail fast with descriptive errors.
Acceptance Criteria: App crashes on startup with clear message if required env vars missing. Config object is typed and validated. .env.example file updated.
Notes: Never access process.env directly after init

Description: Implement configuration that can be reloaded without restarting the server. Watch config files and env vars for changes. Notify subscribers when config updates.
Acceptance Criteria: Config changes reflected without restart. CLI command /reload-config works. Changes logged with old/new values.

Description: Install and configure Jest with coverage reporting. Create test utilities for mocking OpenRouter API calls. Set up pre-commit hooks with Husky.
Acceptance Criteria: npm test runs and passes. Coverage reports generated in coverage/. Pre-commit runs lint and test. jest.config.js configured.

Description: Write tests for orchestrate() runSingleAgent() and callOpenRouter(). Mock axios responses. Test fallback chain behavior. Test tool execution approval flow.
Acceptance Criteria: All core functions have unit tests. Fallback chain tested. Tool approval flow mocked and verified.

Description: Test all /commands with mocked session state. Verify command parsing agent selection and analytics display.
Acceptance Criteria: T7
Effort (SP): Every command has integration test. Session state correctly mutated. Output formatting verified.

Description: Create Zod schemas for user prompts agent configurations command arguments and API payloads. Validate before processing.
Acceptance Criteria: All inputs validated against schemas. Validation errors return user-friendly messages. No invalid data reaches core logic.

Description: Implement basic prompt injection detection. Sanitize user inputs before sending to AI models. Block known injection patterns.
Acceptance Criteria: Known injection patterns are blocked and logged. System prompts are isolated from user content.

Description: Refactor skills from static imports to a plugin system that loads .js files from skills/ directory at startup. Each skill exports metadata name description version permissions and execute function.
Acceptance Criteria: New skills can be added by dropping files in skills/ without code changes. Skills declare required permissions. Registry auto-populated.

Description: Create a JSON API format for skills that includes metadata dependencies and configuration. Support installing skills from GitHub URLs or local paths via CLI command.
Acceptance Criteria: CLI command /install-skill <url> works. Skills from URLs are downloaded validated and registered. Dependency conflicts detected.

Description: Implement RBAC for skills: read write execute network filesystem. Each skill declares required permissions. User must approve elevated permissions.
Acceptance Criteria: Skills cannot execute without declared permissions. Terminal execution requires explicit approval. Permission violations are blocked and logged.

Description: Implement an in-memory task queue (BullMQ or custom) for agent workflows. Support job priority retries delays and dead-letter queues.
Acceptance Criteria: Tasks can be queued with priorities. Failed tasks retry with backoff. Dead letter queue for permanently failed jobs. Queue status queryable.

Description: Create a workflow engine that persists workflow state to database. Support long-running workflows that survive process restarts. Resume from checkpoint.
Acceptance Criteria: Workflow state persisted after each step. Process restart resumes workflows. Checkpoint mechanism for multi-step agent chains.

Description: Create a JSON/YAML format for defining complex agent workflows with branching conditional logic parallel execution and human-in-the-loop approvals.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can define workflows in JSON. Support parallel agent execution. Conditional branching based on previous results. Human approval gates.

Description: Implement a pub/sub event bus for internal communication. Events: agent_start agent_complete tool_call error cost_update. Support event persistence.
Acceptance Criteria: All major actions emit events. Multiple subscribers can listen. Events persisted for audit trail. Event replay possible.

Description: Expose events via Server-Sent Events (SSE) and WebSockets for real-time dashboard updates. Event streaming to TUI and web clients.
Acceptance Criteria: TUI receives real-time updates via WebSocket. Dashboard shows live agent activity. Event latency under 100ms.

Description: Replace JSON files (analytics.json history.json) with SQLite database. Schema: users sessions agents tasks costs events skills. Use better-sqlite3 for sync access.
Acceptance Criteria: All JSON persistence replaced with SQLite. Schema migrations with db-migrate. Connection pooling configured. Backup strategy defined.

Description: Add PostgreSQL adapter for production deployments. Use Knex.js or Prisma for query building. Support connection string configuration.
Acceptance Criteria: App works with PostgreSQL via env var. Same schema as SQLite. Migration system supports both. Connection pooling.

Description: Create aggregated analytics tables for historical reporting. Materialized views for daily/weekly/monthly cost and usage reports.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard shows historical trends. Reports generated in under 2 seconds. Data retention policy implemented.

Description: Implement persistent conversation memory for each agent. Store message history in database with context window management. Support memory summarization.
Acceptance Criteria: Agents remember previous conversations. Context window managed (sliding window + summarization). Memory searchable.

Description: Create a knowledge base system where agents can store and retrieve facts documents and code snippets. Support markdown and code files.
Acceptance Criteria: Agents can save knowledge via tool. Retrieval by semantic similarity. Full-text search support. Version history.

Description: Replace in-memory sessionStats with database-backed sessions. Support resuming sessions across restarts. Session expiration and cleanup.
Acceptance Criteria: Sessions persist after restart. /sessions shows full history from DB. Old sessions auto-archived after 30 days.

Description: Ensure complete data isolation between users. Each user sees only their sessions agents and analytics. Row-level security policies.
Acceptance Criteria: User A cannot see User B data. All queries filtered by user_id. Admin can see all data. Audited access checks.

Description: Implement JWT-based authentication. Support email/password registration login and password reset. OAuth 2.0 integration for Google GitHub.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can register login and reset password. JWT tokens with refresh. OAuth login works. Passwords hashed with bcrypt.

Description: Generate and manage API keys for programmatic access. Keys have scopes and expiration. Support revoking keys.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can create API keys in dashboard. Keys have read/write/admin scopes. Revocation immediate. Keys hashed in DB.

Description: Implement roles: Admin Manager User Guest. Each role has permissions for agents tools and data. Middleware for route protection.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can manage all. Manager can manage team. User sees own data. Guest has read-only. Permission checks on every route.

Description: Support team workspaces with members. Workspace-level agent configurations billing and data isolation. Invite system.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can create workspaces. Invite via email. Workspace settings isolated. Members have roles within workspace.

Description: Log all security-relevant events: login logout failed auth permission changes API key creation. Immutable audit log with signatures.
Acceptance Criteria: T3
Effort (SP): All security events logged. Audit log append-only. Tamper-evident via hashing. Admin can export logs.

Description: Encrypt sensitive data in database (API keys tokens PII). Use TLS 1.3 for all connections. Key rotation strategy.
Effort (SP): Database fields encrypted with AES-256. TLS enforced. Key rotation quarterly. Secrets in environment or vault.

Description: Replace prompt-level sandbox with actual filesystem sandbox using chroot or Docker. Network isolation for agent executions.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent code runs in isolated container. Filesystem restricted to workspace. Network egress controlled. Resource limits enforced.

Description: Create a REST API server with routes for agents sessions analytics users and skills. OpenAPI 3.0 documentation. Rate limiting.
Acceptance Criteria: Server starts and serves API. All routes documented in OpenAPI. Rate limit 100 req/min per user. Graceful shutdown.

Description: Add GraphQL endpoint for flexible queries. Schema for agents sessions costs and analytics. Subscriptions for real-time events.
Acceptance Criteria: GraphQL playground available. All REST resources available via GraphQL. Subscriptions for live events.

Description: Create a Next.js 14 web dashboard with App Router. Pages: Login Dashboard Agents Analytics Settings Team. Dark mode support.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard builds and runs. Responsive design. Dark mode. Real-time updates. Route guards based on auth.

Description: Web interface for browsing 100 agents viewing details assigning tasks and monitoring status. Search and filter by department.
Acceptance Criteria: All 100 agents viewable in grid/list. Detail panel shows model config. Direct task assignment. Status indicators.

Description: Visual charts for costs token usage agent activity over time. Export to CSV/PDF. Date range filtering.
Acceptance Criteria: Charts render correctly. Date filters work. Export generates files. Real-time cost ticker.

Description: Visual drag-and-drop workflow builder. Connect agents with conditions loops and approvals. Save and execute workflows.
Acceptance Criteria: Workflows creatable via UI. Drag-and-drop nodes. Conditional branches. Save to database. Execute from UI.

Description: Multi-user real-time collaboration on sessions and workflows. Cursor presence indicators. Live chat between team members.
Acceptance Criteria: Multiple users see same session updates. Presence indicators. Chat sidebar. Conflict resolution.

Description: Add ChromaDB or Pinecone for vector storage. Store document embeddings. Semantic search across knowledge base.
Acceptance Criteria: Documents chunked and embedded. Semantic search returns relevant chunks. Hybrid search with full-text.

Description: Modify agent prompts to include retrieved context from knowledge base. Citation tracking for sources. Confidence scores.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent responses include cited sources. Retrieved context improves accuracy. Confidence threshold configurable.

Description: Centralize model configurations with health checks. Dynamic routing based on latency cost and quality. Fallback automation.
Acceptance Criteria: Model health checked every 60s. Unhealthy models auto-routed to fallbacks. Cost optimization suggestions.

Description: Add support for local Ollama and LM Studio models. Configure via dashboard. Hybrid cloud-local routing.
Acceptance Criteria: Local models configurable. Fallback to cloud if local unavailable. Latency comparison dashboard.

Description: Support image analysis and audio transcription in agent workflows. Integrate vision models and Whisper.
Acceptance Criteria: Agents can process uploaded images. Audio files transcribed. Multi-modal context in conversations.

Description: Implement usage quotas per user team and workspace. Track credits. Warn at 80% usage. Block at 100% unless admin override.
Acceptance Criteria: Quotas enforced at API level. Real-time usage bar in UI. Email warnings. Admin can grant additional credits.

Description: Outgoing webhooks for events: task_complete agent_fail cost_threshold. Configurable URL headers and retry policy.
Acceptance Criteria: Webhooks sent for configured events. Signature verification with HMAC. Retry with backoff. Delivery status tracked.

Description: Connect to Slack Discord GitHub Jira and Notion. Agents can post updates create issues and send notifications.
Acceptance Criteria: Slack bot integration. GitHub issue creation. Jira ticket creation. Notion page updates. OAuth for each.

Description: Publish official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK and Python client. NPM and PyPI packages. Typed interfaces documentation.
Acceptance Criteria: SDK on NPM. TypeScript definitions. Python client on PyPI. Usage examples in docs. 100% API coverage.

Description: Enterprise features: SSO/SAML SCIM provisioning audit reports data retention policies custom domains.
Acceptance Criteria: SSO via SAML 2.0. SCIM user provisioning. Custom domain support. Data retention configurable.

Description: Service level agreements with guaranteed response times. Priority support queue. Escalation workflows. Status page.
Acceptance Criteria: SLA tracking per organization. Priority queue for enterprise. Escalation to human support. Status page public.

Description: Dockerfile for the app with multi-stage build. Docker Compose with PostgreSQL Redis and app. Health checks and restart policies.
Acceptance Criteria: Docker build succeeds. Compose up brings up full stack. Health checks pass. Graceful shutdown handled.

Description: Create K8s deployments services configmaps and secrets. Horizontal pod autoscaling. Resource limits. Ingress with TLS.
Acceptance Criteria: Manifests deploy to K8s. HPA scales 2-10 pods. Ingress routes traffic. TLS termination at ingress.

Description: Build test lint and security scan on every PR. Deploy to staging on merge. Deploy to production on release tag.
Acceptance Criteria: T7
Effort (SP): CI passes on PR. Auto-deploy to staging. Release tags trigger prod deploy. Security scans block on critical.

Description: Implement /health /ready and /metrics endpoints. Prometheus metrics for request latency error rates queue depth agent activity.
Acceptance Criteria: Health endpoint returns 200 when ready. Prometheus scrapes metrics. Grafana dashboard imports.

Description: Configure alerts for high error rates cost spikes queue backlog and model failures. Alert via email Slack PagerDuty.
Acceptance Criteria: Alerts fire when thresholds exceeded. Alert history viewable. Escalation rules configured.

Description: Automated daily backups of SQLite/PostgreSQL. Point-in-time recovery. Backup testing monthly. Cross-region replication for prod.
Acceptance Criteria: Backups run daily. Restore tested monthly. RPO 24 hours RTO 4 hours. Cross-region for enterprise.

Description: Add Redis for caching model responses session data and analytics. TTL-based expiration. Cache invalidation strategies.
Acceptance Criteria: Repeated queries served from cache. Cache hit ratio > 70%. Invalidation on data change. Stale-while-revalidate.

Description: k6 or Artillery load tests for API endpoints. Identify bottlenecks. Optimize database queries. Connection pooling review.
Acceptance Criteria: Load tests run at 1000 concurrent users. P95 latency under 500ms. Database query time under 50ms.

Description: Auto-generated OpenAPI documentation from routes. Interactive Swagger UI. Code examples in multiple languages.
Effort (SP): Swagger UI at /docs. All endpoints documented. Request/response examples. Auth instructions.

Description: Comprehensive documentation: quick start user guide admin guide developer guide architecture decision records.
Acceptance Criteria: Documentation site live. Searchable. Versioned per release. Contribution guide included.

Description: JSDoc for all functions classes and modules. Generate HTML documentation. Type definitions exported.
Acceptance Criteria: All public APIs have JSDoc. TypeScript declaration files generated. IDE autocomplete works.

Description: Add more MCP tools: list_agents get_agent_status assign_task get_analytics. Support SSE transport for remote MCP.
Acceptance Criteria: New MCP tools implemented. SSE transport works. Tool schema documented.

Description: Add --version --config --verbose flags. Better error messages. Shell completion for bash/zsh/fish. Man page.
Acceptance Criteria: orca --version works. --config points to custom config. Shell completions installed. Man page generated.

Description: Add vim/emacs keybindings. Command history with up/down. Split-pane view. Syntax highlighting for code in responses.
Acceptance Criteria: Keybindings work. History persists. Code blocks highlighted. TUI feels like a modern IDE.

Description: True parallel agent execution for Swarm mode. Result aggregation strategies (voting best-of-n synthesis). Conflict resolution.
Acceptance Criteria: Multiple agents run in parallel. Results aggregated intelligently. Conflicts detected and resolved. Synthesis quality improved.

Description: Track per-agent success rate latency token efficiency and output quality. Leaderboard and automatic model re-routing.
Acceptance Criteria: Metrics stored per agent. Dashboard shows leaderboard. Poor performers auto-fallback to better models.

Description: Allow users to create custom agents with custom prompts models and tools. Agent templates for common roles.
Acceptance Criteria: Custom agents creatable via UI. Templates provided. Export/import agent configs. Share with team.

Description: Script to migrate existing JSON analytics and history files into the new SQLite/PostgreSQL database. Idempotent and safe.
Acceptance Criteria: Migration script runs without data loss. Handles duplicates. Rollback plan documented. Verified with checksums.

Description: Document step-by-step guide for migrating from v1 (JSON files) to v2 (database). Breaking changes and new features listed.
Acceptance Criteria: MIGRATION.md created. Clear instructions. Troubleshooting section. Backup instructions.
